final:
module top_module(
    input wire obf_a,
    input wire b,
    input wire c,
    output reg out,
    input wire[2:0] sel
);always @(obf_a, b, c, sel) begin: assig_process_out
        case(sel)
            3'b000:
                out = obf_a;
            3'b001:
                out = b;
            3'b010:
                out = c;
            default:
                out = 1'b0;
        endcase
    end

endmodule
